title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 185.215 - Limitation on funding percentage
text:
185.215.  Limitation on funding percentage. — The amount of any state funding provided by sections 185.200 to 185.230 shall not exceed thirty percent of the operating expenditures for the previous year of the public television station receiving said grant.
(L. 2006 S.B. 870) 
Effective 7-01-06
